data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding timezone overlap.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation that the system finds overlap in timezones (9am NY = 6am LA = 11pm Tokyo). However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations that this requirement has been satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for timezone overlap, but there is no direct evidence that this requirement has been tested or confirmed, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the system finds overlap in timezones.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the timezone overlap requirement.
